name_en: Premium quality, mini B-clasp messenger bag. Crafted from protective cotton-blend fabric in an Italian atelier. Decorated with fine knit Burberry check and lined with the same fabric. Features a curved design named for the B-clasp on the front pocket, which bears the Burberry logo. Equipped with an adjustable mesh shoulder strap for a shoulder or crossbody carry. Dimensions 19 x 9 x 17.5cm
